arts.ttl: 'Spectacular': Martin Keown says striker who left Man United for free was actually better than Harry Kane

Daily Schmankerl: Amid interest from Manchester City and Liverpool, Joshua Kimmich leaning toward Bayern Munich deal; Real Madrid to miss on Trent Alexander-Arnold this month; Benjamin Šeško staying at RB Leipzig; and MORE!
arts.sum: Despite that, Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau says that Kimmich is still favoring a contract extension with Bayern Munich: Bayern Munich is still interested in Chelsea FC attacker Christopher Nkunku and could have less competition because Manchester United could be set to drop out of the race for the former RB Leipzig man:

arts.ttl: With heavy schedule, Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany can’t keep up with flailing Manchester City
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany played at Manchester City for a long time and the club will clearly always hold a place in his heart. However, that does not mean that Kompany has spent much — if any — time following the recent collapse of Pep Guardiola’s side.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich won’t make big transfer splashes in January
arts.sum: Ousmane Diomande (around €60m price tag) and Rayan Cherki (€22.5m), although being watched, are not a topic for Bayern in the January transfer window . The Bavarians are balking at heavy price tags for reported transfer targets Ousmane Diomande and Rayan Cherki.

arts.ttl: €100M man? Why Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens is likely destined for the Premier League, not Bayern Munich
arts.sum: If Bayern Munich wants to nab promising young Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens, they may have to seriously pony up — and even that might not be enough. FC Bayern are taking the competition with English clubs very seriously and hope that BVB will be forced into selling Gittens should they fail to qualify for Champions League football in 2025/26.

arts.ttl: Report reveals details of Alphonso Davies contract with Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich set to complete swoop for Köln keeper Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s swoop for promising young German keeper Jonas Urbig looks set to be accomplished soon, per a report from Sport Bild. FC Köln internally expect the transfer of Jonas Urbig to Bayern to be completed within the next few days.

arts.ttl: Predicted Freiburg v Bayern Munich XIs: Forced changes for Vincent Kompany’s side
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany will be forced into two changes when his Bayern Munich side face Freiburg at Europa Park on Saturday afternoon. Konrad Laimer has accumulated five yellow cards in the…

Freiburg have all week to plot a shock, while Bayern lost 3-0 to Feyenoord on Wednesday in the Champions League. Freiburg in eighth, boast eight wins and seven defeats, coming out second best to all ...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s Dayot Upamecano could miss key SC Freiburg contest
